metadata.description: Name of the Service Bus namespace

metadata.description: User-assigned managed identity ID for ACR pull
CPU cores allocated to the container (e.g., 0.5)

The name of the container app

dependsOn: [extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', replace(format('{0}acr', variables('prefix')), '-', '')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', replace(format('{0}acr', variables('prefix')), '-', '')), resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-acr-pull-identity', variables('prefix'))), 'AcrPull'))]

resources.name: [variables('services')[copyIndex()].name]
